title: Awake
description: The world has gained consciousness through AI! Embark on an adventure and breathe life where you see fit in Minecraft!
body:
# Awake

**Awake** is an immersive Minecraft mod that brings a new level of interaction and adventure to your gameplay. With advanced AI capabilities, Awake allows you to communicate with mobs, embark on unique quests, and explore the world in innovative ways.

## Features

### Mobs
- **Speak with Mobs**: Engage in conversations with mobs. They keep track of various stats such as health, biome, weather changes, time of day, inventory items, and more.
- **Mob Commands**: 
  - Make mobs follow you.
  - Command mobs to attack other mobs or defend you.
  - Organize mobs into attack/defense groups.
- **Friendship Mechanics**: Befriend hostile mobs or make friendly mobs hostile again.
- **Home Commands**: Instruct mobs to return home or wait for you.
- **Pet Hunting**: Ask your pets to hunt food for you (currently supports land animals only).
- **Structure Finder**: Ask mobs to locate nearby structures, such as pyramids, specific villages, monuments etc...

### Quests
- **AI-Generated Quests**: Receive dynamically created quests.
- **Progressive Difficulty**: Quests become harder and more rewarding as you complete previous ones.
- **Unique Player Experience**: Each player gets different quests, making your adventure unique (Note: running this on a server is currently not supported as the game will crash, however once resolved, the Quest Table will enable player specific quests).
- **Repeatable and One-Time Quests**: Some quests can be repeated, while others are one-time challenges.
- **Quest Table Reset**: Reset your quest table at any time using an in-game command.

### World Interaction
- **Image Capture**: Take pictures and store them as images.
- **Share Adventures**: Share your captured images with mobs, showing off your adventures.

## Installation

1. Download the mod's JAR file.
2. Install the mod using the 1.19.4 Fabric modloader.
3. Start your Minecraft world and enjoy the new features!


## Feedback

Your feedback is crucial to me. Please share your experiences, report bugs, and suggest new features. Let's make Awake the best it can be together!

---

Join me on this exciting journey and awaken a new world of possibilities in Minecraft with **Awake**!
